\tzpentry{ID3828}{Tunnel Quantum Vector Potential Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3828 introduces Tunnel Quantum Vector Potential Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ A_{\text{tunnel}} = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} A_n \exp\bigl(-n S_0/\hbar\bigr), \]
